name: 3-Box Stat Cluster
description: Three statistics displayed in colorful boxes with connectors, plus a verdict summary at the bottom

fields.STAT_VALUE_1: large number or short word for box 1
fields.STAT_VALUE_2: large number or short word for box 2
fields.STAT_VALUE_3: large number or short word for box 3
fields.LABEL_1: short label for stat 1 max 4 words
fields.LABEL_2: short label for stat 2 max 4 words
fields.LABEL_3: short label for stat 3 max 4 words
fields.SUB_1: one line context for stat 1 max 6 words
fields.SUB_2: one line context for stat 2 max 6 words
fields.SUB_3: one line context for stat 3 max 6 words
fields.VERDICT_TEXT: one sentence conclusion from the script
